struct CustomerId(u64);
struct ProductId(u64);

impl CustomerId {
    fn new(v: u64) -> Self { Self(v) }
    fn as_u64(&self) -> u64 { self.0 }
}

impl ProductId {
    fn new(v: u64) -> Self { Self(v) }
    fn as_u64(&self) -> u64 { self.0 }
}

struct Percentage(f64);
struct Money(f64);
struct Weight(f64);
struct Distance(f64);

struct Customer {
    id: CustomerId,
    name: String,
    email: String,
    discount_rate: Percentage,
    credit_limit: Money,
}

impl Customer {
    fn apply_discount(&self, amount: Money) -> Money {
        Money(amount.0 * (1.0 - self.discount_rate.0))
    }
}

struct Order {
    customer_id: CustomerId,
    product_id: ProductId,
    quantity: u32,
    total: Money,
}

fn calculate_shipping(weight: Weight, distance: Distance) -> Money {
    Money(weight.0 * distance.0 * 0.01)
}
